Switch.Name: Enable Status HUD Sorting
Switch.Hint: When enabled, the status effects labels will also be shown and an opinionated sorting will take place

SortingType.Name: Status effects sorting
SortingType.Hint: Fill by rows (left → right) or by columns (top → bottom)

NumberColumns.Name: Number of columns
NumberColumns.Hint: Divide the HUD status effects into this number of columns

BASES.IncompatibleSystemError: Bugbear's Assign Status Effects Sorter is not compatible with your system and the Assign Status Effects HUD changes have been disabled. Disabling the module is recommended!
